methods.name: PL-LOAM-RGB
methods.note: PL-LOAM (Huang et al., ICRA 2020): LiDAR-monocular point+line VO with depth priors in PL-BA; no GT seed. eval=KITTI-Raw-RGB mean_scale_correction=0.974130 mean_depth_prior_residual=2.545926 rgb_frames=200

methods.name: VLOM-RGB
methods.note: VLOM (arXiv:2304.08978): scale correction + visual-bootstrapped A-LOAM; eval=KITTI-Raw-RGB; no GT seed. mean_scale=1.000 bootstrap_frames=199 rgb_frames=200
